frostbound-gauntlets.name: Frostbound Gauntlets
frostbound-gauntlets.description: Gauntlets ripped from the Gate Warden's frozen hands. They still grip with a dead sentinel's strength.

shattered-seal-ring.name: Shattered Seal Ring
shattered-seal-ring.description: A ring made from a fragment of the ancient seal. It still hums with binding magic.

frost-speaker-vestments.name: Frost Speaker Vestments
frost-speaker-vestments.description: Robes worn by the frost giant high priest. The fabric is woven from crystallized prayers.

frozen-prayer-amulet.name: Frozen Prayer Amulet
frozen-prayer-amulet.description: The Frost Speaker's holy symbol. Prayers whispered to it are answered — in frost.

permafrost-treads.name: Permafrost Treads
permafrost-treads.description: Boots from the frozen court. They never slip on ice and leave frost prints on any surface.

valdris-frostplate.name: Valdris's Frostplate
valdris-frostplate.description: The champion's armor, forged from glacier-core iron. It absorbed a thousand years of frost magic and became something beyond mortal smithing.

glacial-crown.name: Glacial Crown
glacial-crown.description: A circlet of living ice that adjusts to fit any head. It channels frost magic with terrifying efficiency.

aldrics-frozen-crown.name: Aldric's Frozen Crown
aldrics-frozen-crown.description: The Frost King's crown, cracked but still radiating the authority of an ancient monarch. Wearing it feels like commanding winter itself.

throne-of-frost-blade.name: Throne of Frost Blade
throne-of-frost-blade.description: Forged from the frozen lightning that Aldric wielded. It crackles with cold energy that numbs anything it touches.

frostking-signet.name: Frostking Signet
frostking-signet.description: The royal seal of the frost giant court. It commands obedience from the cold itself.

eternal-ice-codex.name: Eternal Ice Codex
eternal-ice-codex.description: A tome of frost magic bound in drake-scale leather. Its pages are sheets of enchanted ice that never melt.
